channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Duckett, Curran the difference as England clinch India series in Lord's run-fest
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Ben Duckett's century and Sam Curran's late burst of wickets inspired England to a series-clinching 27-run win over India in the third ODI at Lord's.

item.title: 'I reached rock bottom' - Antonelli admits shock as title charge accelerates
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Kimi Antonelli has admitted he couldn't have imagined being in a dominant position at the top of the Formula 1 world championship 12 months ago when he reached "rock bottom" during his rookie campaign.

item.title: 2027: Kebbi ADC Alleges Malami’s Prosecution Is Politically Motivated
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The Kebbi State chapter of the African Democratic Congress (ADC) has alleged that the prosecution of its governorship candidate and former Attorney-General of the Federation and Minister of Justice, Abubakar Malami, is politically motivated and aimed at weakening the opposition ahead of the 2027 gen

item.title: WAFCON 2026: 19 Players In Camp As Super Falcons Intensify Preparations
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Only six players of Cup-holders Nigeria’s Super Falcons were still being expected at the team’s camp in Casablanca on Sunday night, following the arrival of more players at the Hotel Marriott as 15 players trained at the La Noria Club in the evening. The BK Hacken FC of Sweden duo of Hal

item.title: Peller unveils ₦700,000 Aso Ebi, expects 400 guests at August wedding
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Popular TikTok content creator Habeeb Hamzat, widely known as Peller, has revealed that the eight-yard version of the official aso ebi for his forthcoming wedding to fellow content creator Elizabeth Aminata, popularly known as Jarvis, costs ₦700,000, with about 400 guests expected to wear the fabric

item.title: LIVE UPDATES: Spain, Argentina Battle For World Cup Glory
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: With two of international football's most successful nations meeting on the grandest stage, fans can expect a fiercely contested battle for global supremacy. The post LIVE UPDATES: Spain, Argentina Battle For World Cup Glory appeared first on Channels Television.

item.title: NDC congratulates Peter Obi at 65
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The leadership of the National Democratic Congress, NDC, has congratulated its Presidential Candidate, Peter Obi, at 65, ahead of the 2027 polls. The post NDC congratulates Peter Obi at 65 appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: Toke Makinwa Reacts To Backlash Over Comment About Supporting Man Financially
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Popular Nigerian media personality and Nollywood actress, Toke Makinwa, has reacted to the backlash trailing her recent comment on women financially supporting a man. Sunday Telegraph reports that Toke Makinwa had on her podcast #TokeMoment said she struggles to understand when women say they financ

item.title: IShowSpeed kicks off World Cup closing ceremony in blaze of colour
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Another star-studded performance at half-time will include Shakira, BTS, Madonna and Justin Bieber.

item.description: The All Progressives Congress, APC, governorship candidate for the August 15 poll has assured residents of the state that he will make the state safe for business to thrive and citizens to prosper. item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: Dressed in an all-white suit, IShowSpeed sang amid a group of dancers wearing brightly coloured neon tracksuits.

item.title: Enugu govt approves massive infrastructural, tourism projects
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: “Further to that, the Exco also approved the commencement of repairs on Wings A and B of the Secretariat to address all the challenges that the building is facing.” The post Enugu govt approves massive infrastructural, tourism projects appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: Hundreds Evacuated As Wildfire Scorches 13,000 Hectares In Spain
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: The wildfire comes after another blaze broke out on Wednesday near Zaragoza, in the northeastern region of Aragon, forcing around 1,000 people to evacuate their homes. The post Hundreds Evacuated As Wildfire Scorches 13,000 Hectares In Spain appeared first on Channels Television.

item.title: You are a product of your decisions, By Sunday Adelaja
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: Every decision carries consequences. Once you make a decision, you become accountable to the outcome of that decision, whether good or bad. So if you want a different life, begin by making different decisions… Choose wisely. Choose intentionally. Choose with the future in mind. Never forget: Y

item.title: Benue Kidnappers Free Driver, Hold 2 Siblings, Demand ₦30m Ransom
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Some of the victims abducted along the Otukpo–Ogobia Road in Benue State have regained their freedom after gunmen released the driver, the body of an elderly woman and one of her three children. The abductors, however, are still holding two of the siblings and have demanded a ₦30 million ransom for

item.title: Worker rescued alive after wall collapse during demolition in Kano
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: A worker has been rescued alive after a fencing wall collapsed during a demolition exercise at Kofar Mata Zango in Kano Municipal Local Government Area on Sunday. The incident was confirmed in a statement issued by the Kano State Fire Service through its Public Relations Officer, ACFO Saminu Yu

Nigeria are the most successful team in the history of the Women’s Africa Cup of Nations, having won a record 10 titles. Justine Madugu’s sid

item.title: Bauchi Police Recover Sixth Stolen Vehicle in July, Arrest Two Suspects
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The Bauchi State Police Command has intensified its crackdown on vehicle theft with the arrest of two suspected car thieves and the recovery of a stolen 2022 Toyota Hilux allegedly trafficked from Jos, Plateau State. Commissioner of Police, CP Sani-Omolori Aliyu, said the latest recovery brings to a

item.title: Fox pips Young to major glory at The Open after final-hole thriller
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Ryan Fox claimed a maiden major title after a final-hole birdie snatched a dramatic one-shot victory over Cameron Young at The 154th Open.

item.description: Decree comes after hardline backers of the Iranian government accused officials of treason for signing an MoU with US.

The 29-year-old centre-back endured a difficult campaign with French club Nantes last season, as the Canaries su

item.title: At least 50 Malian soldiers killed in attack on military convoy
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: At least 50 Malian soldiers were killed after a joint Malian army and Russia's Africa Corps convoy was ambushed.

item.title: Corps members, police rig elections, not INEC chair – Deji Adeleke
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: “You cannot blame that on the INEC chairman when youth corps members are collecting ₦50,000 and changing figures at the polling unit,” Adeleke said.

item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Seven suspected kidnappers involved in separate kidnapping and armed robbery incidents across Anambra state have been arrested by the Police Command. item.title: Russia launches major ballistic missile attack on Ukrainian cities
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: Eight people die and dozens are injured as several cities are hit by missile and drone attacks, while Kyiv continues its own assault on Russian infrastructure.

item.description: Aoun is expected to meet Donald Trump on Tuesday, as Beirut seeks US backing to end Israel-Hezbollah fighting.

NLC president, Comrade Joe Ajaero, disclosed this during the commissioning of the Comrade Godwin Abu

item.title: CSO Seeks Independent Probe Into Death Of NSCDC Officer

item.description: The National Civil Society Council of Nigeria (NCSCN) has called for an independent and impartial investigation into the death of Deputy Superintendent of Corps (DSC) of the Nigeria Security and Civil Defence Corps (NSCDC), Agada Levi Agada, whose passing has generated significant public concern and

item.title: Bauchi LGs Step Up Nutrition Funding As CS-SUNN Intensifies Anti-Stunting Campaign
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Local government councils in Bauchi State are beginning to increase investment in nutrition programmes following sustained advocacy by the Civil Society-Scaling Up Nutrition in Nigeria (CS-SUNN) under the Partnership for Improving Nutrition in Nigeria Systems (PINNS 3.0) project. The advocacy, which

item.title: E-Invoicing: NRS Issues Deadline For Compliance
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The Nigeria Revenue Service (NRS) has set a July 31 deadline for all large taxpayers to wholly adopt the national e-invoicing and electronic fiscal system (EFS). This is sequel to a public notice issued by NRS on February 17, 2026 on the implementation timeline and the mandatory adoption of the nati

item.description: Fifteen children are among 67 people rescued, officials say, with dozens still missing.

item.dc:creator: Leadership

The ECNBA had earlier declared Oyinkansola Badejo-Okusanya SAN as the winner of the 2026 election of the legal body having polled

item.description: “I would love to do many things, but the reality is that even if people think I am all-powerful, I don’t have that much power to tackle certain things.”

item.description: “The operation demonstrates the navy’s determination to deny crude oil thieves the opportunity to regain operational footholds or rebuild illegal refining infrastructure within its area of responsibility,” he said.

item.title: Police Arrest Four Suspected Kidnappers In Anambra
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: The Anambra State Police Command has arrested four suspected kidnappers in separate operations across the state, recovering a locally fabricated pistol, live ammunition, an axe and a vehicle allegedly used in kidnapping operations. The command said one of the suspects, identified as Okoye Ibegbunam

item.description: “I have closed.” Those were the doctor’s words when my sister and I returned to Gwarimpa General Hospital at about 3 p.m. with the laboratory result the doctor had requested for my six-month-old niece. item.description: Security operatives have launched a rescue operation for one of three siblings abducted by gunmen in Benue State while transporting their mother’s corpse from Abuja for burial. item.title: 'My heart really sank' - Hamilton relieved mechanic unhurt after hit
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Lewis Hamilton says his "heart really sank" when his Ferrari car hit a mechanic in a pit stop in an incident that saw the team fined heavily by Belgian Grand Prix stewards.

item.description: Canada has imposed temporary entry restrictions barring foreign nationals who have recently been to the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) from entering the country, citing the risk of importing the Ebola disease, despite the World Health Organisation (WHO) advising against travel restrictions as a

item.title: ISWAP commander Abu Hassan reportedly killed in failed Borno attack
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: A senior commander of the Islamic State West Africa Province (ISWAP), identified as Abu Hassan, has reportedly been killed during a failed attack on Cross Kauwa in Borno State. The development was disclosed in a post shared on X on Sunday by security analyst Zagazola Makama, who cited inte

item.title: Ooni Of Ife Loses Elder Brother, Prince Adetunji Ogunwusi
item.dc:creator: Information Nigeria
item.description: The death of Prince Adetunji was announced on Sunday in a statement by the Ooni of Ife Leadership Colloquium, which paid tribute to his life and contributions to business and society. “It is with profound sadness that we received news of Prince Adetunji Ogunwusi’s passing, leaving family

item.title: Oyinkansola Badejo-Okunsanya: List of winners of 2026 NBA elections
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The results published on the ECNBA portal and confirmed by Ejelam showed that 26,184 lawyers voted out of the association's 82,172 registered voters, giving a voter turnout of 31.86 per cent. Below is the full list of winners in the 2026 NBA national elections: The post Oyinkansola Badejo-Okunsanya:

item.title: I hate that I don’t hate this song made with Suno
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: I would never go so far as to say there's no place for AI in music (I'm a fan of Holly Herndon, after all). But I generally find music made with generative AI to be offensively boring, especially the outputs of Suno. So I'm having a bit of a tough time processing the fact that […]

item.title: 2027: Adeola, Iyabo Obasanjo clash over APC exit
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: By James Ogunnaike, Abeokuta The governorship candidate of the All Progressives Congress (APC) in Ogun State, Senator Solomon Adeola, and former Senator Iyabo Obasanjo have exchanged accusations following her defection from the ruling party to the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP). Adeola accused some

item.title: “Grace Looks Good on Me”: Kate Henshaw Reflects On Life As She Marks 55th Birthday
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Veteran Nollywood actress Kate Henshaw is celebrating her 55th birthday with a heartfelt message of gratitude, resilience and self-reflection, describing grace as the defining theme of her life’s journey. Taking to social media to commemorate the milestone, Henshaw reflected on the experiences

item.title: IPMAN opposes rising petrol imports, warns of higher pump prices
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: By Obas Esiedesa, Abuja The Independent Petroleum Marketers Association of Nigeria (IPMAN) has raised concerns over the recent increase in petroleum product import licences, warning that the development could worsen price instability, increase pressure on the naira and push petrol prices higher. Nat

item.title: Atiku, Kwankwaso Hail Peter Obi At 65
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Former Vice President Atiku Abubakar and former Kano State Governor Rabiu Musa Kwankwaso have congratulated the presidential candidate of the Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC), Mr Peter Obi, on his 65th birthday. In separate messages posted on their social media pages on Sunday, the two political le

item.title: Drake places N2bn bet on Argentina to beat Spain in World Cup final
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Canadian rapper Drake has placed a $1.5 million (about N2.3 billion) bet on Argentina to defeat Spain in Sunday's 2026 FIFA World Cup final. The post Drake places N2bn bet on Argentina to beat Spain in World Cup final appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: Singer Niniola Describes How Being A Young Widow Feels Like 2 Months After Husband’s Death
item.dc:creator: SDK Celeb
item.description: Nigerian singer Niniola has shared a touching message on X. Today marks two months since her husband, business manager, and best friend Michael passed away suddenly.Her post is heartbreaking.....

item.title: FG partners NIMC to strengthen transparency, security in mining sector
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: According to him, technology, reliable data and digital identity have become indispensable tools for planning, regulation, investment and The post FG partners NIMC to strengthen transparency, security in mining sector appeared first on Tribune Online.
